task_completion.description: Open the initial sales report document
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Writer is open, displaying a document with a 'Regional Revenue' table. The window title or tab should indicate 'sales_report.odt'.

task_completion.description: Insert a Column or Bar chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Column or Bar chart is visible within the LibreOffice Writer document.

task_completion.description: Chart uses the correct table data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart displays 4 groups of columns/bars corresponding to the 4 regions (North, South, East, West) and a legend with 4 series (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4).

task_completion.description: Set the chart title and axis labels
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart has the title '2024 Regional Revenue Trends', the X-axis label 'Region', and the Y-axis label 'Revenue ($M)'.

task_completion.description: Position the chart below the data table without obscuring text
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart is located immediately below the 'Regional Revenue' table and does not overlap or hide any document text.
The LibreOffice window title shows 'sales_report_final.odt', or a 'Save As' dialog is visible with this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice GUI to create the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show LibreOffice menus, chart wizard, or chart editing UI being used, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The chart is a genuine LibreOffice chart object.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears integrated into the document, potentially showing OLE object handles or LibreOffice chart formatting sidebars when selected, rather than an imported static image.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with LibreOffice Writer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly belongs to LibreOffice Writer, showing its standard toolbars and interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input document contains a 5x5 table with 4 regions (North, South, East, West) and 4 quarters (Q1-Q4). The chart must be a Column or Bar chart. The chart title must be exactly '2024 Regional Revenue Trends'. The X-axis label must be 'Region' and the Y-axis label must be 'Revenue ($M)'. The chart should display 4 data series corresponding to the quarters. The final file must be saved as 'sales_report_final.odt'.
